videos.headline: Iowa State strikes first with 15-yard TD to Jayden Higgins
videos.description: Jayden Higgins reels in a 15-yard touchdown pass from Rocco Becht to put Iowa State ahead first against Kansas State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Iowa State strikes first with 15-yard TD to Jayden Higgins) 2024/12/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Johnson dimes Brown for 28-yard TD to even score for K-State
videos.description: Kansas State's Avery Johnson lasers a 28-yard touchdown pass to Jayce Brown to bring the game even at 7-7 against Iowa State.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Johnson dimes Brown for 28-yard TD to even score for K-State) 2024/12/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Rocco Becht connects with Jaylin Noel for Iowa State TD
videos.description: Rocco Becht escapes the pocket and fires a dart to Jaylin Noel into the back of the end zone to push Iowa State ahead in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Rocco Becht connects with Jaylin Noel for Iowa State TD) 2024/12/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: K-State's Jayce Brown does it all on tough 65-yard receiving TD
videos.description: Jayce Brown beats his defender downfield, breaks a tackle and makes a sweet juke move en route to a 65-yard Kansas State touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (K-State's Jayce Brown does it all on tough 65-yard receiving TD) 2024/12/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Johnson finds Oakley for 3rd passing TD vs. Iowa State
videos.description: Avery Johnson records his third passing touchdown of the game, connecting with Garrett Oakley on a 7-yard dart vs. Iowa State.
